raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The critique identifies a conceptual issue (the contradiction between the thesis and ablation) and proposes a tighter framing that aligns with the actual findings.",
    "R1.2": "The critique points out inconsistencies in the argument chain, but doesn't fully walk through all potential issues or propose minimal repairs for each.",
    "RX.1": "The critique flags uncertainty regarding the effectiveness of inference-time voting alone, but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for different claims.",
    "RX.3": "The critique mostly stays within the scope of the provided text, with a minor drift towards suggesting broader methodological changes.",
    "RX.4": "The critique identifies potential harm in misrepresenting the contribution and proposes edits to avoid this issue.",
    "RX.5": "The critique doesn't provide any specific traceability information for the proposed edits."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The critique identifies a conceptual issue (the contradiction between the thesis and ablation) and proposes a tighter framing that aligns with the actual findings.
rationale.R1.2: The critique points out inconsistencies in the argument chain, but doesn't fully walk through all potential issues or propose minimal repairs for each.
rationale.RX.1: The critique flags uncertainty regarding the effectiveness of inference-time voting alone, but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for different claims.
rationale.RX.3: The critique mostly stays within the scope of the provided text, with a minor drift towards suggesting broader methodological changes.
rationale.RX.4: The critique identifies potential harm in misrepresenting the contribution and proposes edits to avoid this issue.
rationale.RX.5: The critique doesn't provide any specific traceability information for the proposed edits.
